---
title: "Research Methodology"
subtitle: "Fundamentals of research design, data collection, and academic writing in Geography."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include research-methodology/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Research Methodology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="attachments/img/research_data.gif" alt="Research Data Analysis" style="border-radius: 10px; margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; box-shadow: 0px 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); max-width: 100%; height: auto;">
</div>

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include research-methodology/01-research-design.md >}}

{{< include research-methodology/02-data-collection-methods.md >}}

{{< include research-methodology/03-academic-writing-and-ethics.md >}}

---
